bead.title: bead interfaces: assert ctx-first Store foundation contracts
bead.description:
PROBLEM
After the Store methods are migrated in smaller slices, TD-027 still needs one local proof that the bead package exposes a coherent ctx-first foundation contract. Without compile-time assertions, backend.go can drift back toward legacy variadic interfaces even when store.go has typed methods.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/internal/bead/backend.go:74-89 is the foundation interface surface for TD-027, but it currently mixes legacy variadic Init, ReadAll, ReadAllFiltered, Get, and Create with ctx-first Apply.
- cli/internal/bead/store.go:148-179, cli/internal/bead/store.go:181-240, cli/internal/bead/store.go:517-655, cli/internal/bead/store.go:1499-1535, and cli/internal/bead/archive.go:158-174 are the concrete Store methods that must satisfy the final typed contract.

PROPOSED FIX
After the setup/id, read, and mutation signature children land, add or update local compile-time assertions and tests proving *Store satisfies the ctx-first foundation interfaces in cli/internal/bead/backend.go. Keep this bead local to cli/internal/bead except for any test-only imports already in that package. Do not perform another caller sweep here.

NON-SCOPE
- Caller migration in cli/cmd, cli/internal/agent, cli/internal/server, cli/internal/escalation, and metrics packages; those changes belong to the method-group children.
- Event method ctx threading: AppendEvent, Events, and EventsByKind.
- Removing workflow helper methods beyond the foundational signatures this bead verifies.

GOVERNING ARTIFACT
- TD-027.

PARENT/DEPS
- Parent/split source: ddx-464feba2.
- Deps: depends on the three sibling children that migrate setup/id, read, and mutation Store signatures.
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/internal/bead/backend.go declares BeadInitializer, BeadReader, and BeadLifecycle with ctx-first typed signatures matching the final Store methods.
2. Add compile-time assertions, preferably in cli/internal/bead/store_test.go or a narrow package-local test file, proving *Store implements BeadInitializer, BeadReader, and BeadLifecycle.
3. Add or update deterministic tests named TestStoreImplementsCtxFirstFoundationInterfaces and TestCtxFirstFoundationInterfacesExposeTypedMethods.
4. This bead makes no caller-package changes outside cli/internal/bead.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... -run 'Test(StoreImplementsCtxFirstFoundationInterfaces|CtxFirstFoundationInterfacesExposeTypedMethods)' passes.
6. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... passes.
7. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
